description: RAG Web Browser - Web scraping tool for RAG pipelines. It queries Google Search, scrapes the top N pages, and returns their content as Markdown.

properties.title: URL
properties.name: url
properties.description: This parameter is used to specify the URL to be fetched.

properties.title: Max Results
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: Maximum number of results to return from the search.

properties.title: Output Format
properties.name: outputFormat
properties.description: The format of the output content.

properties.title: Scraping Tool
properties.name: scrapingTool
properties.description: The tool to use for scraping web content.

properties.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a request to complete.

properties.title: Remove Cookie Warnings
properties.name: removeCookieWarnings
properties.description: Automatically remove cookie warning banners from pages.
